_status: UNVERIFIED DRAFT SEED — partial provision-node extraction from an aborted architect-side run (2026-07-21, stopped to move execution to the Opus session per the token-division directive). Coverage: the two completed extraction ranges only (Preamble through ~Article XXIV); Articles XXV-XXVIII + Founding Affirmation NOT covered. Every row must be verified against charter.html or regenerated before use; the committed charter-dependency-graph.json supersedes this file.

nodes.label: Voluntary society under moral causality; full dignity default; consequence follows choice
Consequence follows conduct; civilization reveals what has been earned
Highest-trust layer: harm halted before completion; no Sanctuary citizen victimized
Lived-trust layer: harm may complete; answered afterward; agency preserved
No life is ended; no life is absolved; both truths hold at once
Four lines: symbolic anchor, unchanged, amendable via Article XI gauntlet
Layers are graduated environments assigned by demonstrated intent and execution of harm
Heaven Layers (+1, SADs): acts halted mid-execution via neural inhibition, drones
Main Layer (0): acts may complete; victims revived/treated; perpetrators reassigned
Lower Layers (-1,-2,-3): post-intervention; minimal institutional presence in -3 Terminal
Main-to--1 threshold is categorical, not continuous; exactly two reassignment pathways
Pathway 1: single incarceration-grade event (DUI, assault, fraud at meaningful scale)
Pathway 2: sustained accumulation of minor infractions without remediation
Minor infractions clearable/amendable; only uncorrected accumulation converts to pattern
STI: separate reputational ledger for non-criminal trust violations
Tiered visibility: minor violations private, major violations public
STI gates access to Trust Threshold Domains
No STI crossover to VMSS layer reassignment
STI dips only on outwardly expressed actions; cognition carries no penalties or gains
10:1 penalty-to-recovery ratio; asymmetry closes boundary-riding exploit
magnitudes: years of accumulated trust in hours

nodes.label: STI formula proprietary, classified, dynamic; weighted on best outcomes; three defenses
Formula not published to population; opacity forces genuine conduct
Formula internals need top-secret clearance; Meritboard audits via output analysis only
Formula self-adjusts at AI governance level; seven fixed dimensions, evolving weights
Public rating scored by layer population against its ambient standard
Under-18: null STI; ledger records from birth; no score computed or published
Phasing thresholds cannot evaluate null; 85-point Sanctuary floor does not trigger
At 18 STI initializes from full birth ledger; score sets immediate layer eligibility
Qualifying events exempt from null protection; flagged on Track 2 regardless of age
Automation Dividend Treasury funds UBI for all citizens across all layers; birthright
UBI baselines by layer: $10,000 / $5,000 / $2,500 / $1,250 per month
No layer permits starvation; halving structure incentivizes compliance with dignity
PJS: supplement for one qualifying job of 20+ hrs/week; time dividend
PJS baseline amounts mirror UBI by layer
No minimum wage in VMSS; employers set market wages freely
Hours beyond 20/week trigger employer-paid overtime premium; never civilization-funded
Overtime rates: $125/hr Main, $62.50 -1, $31.25 -2, $15.63 -3; weekly = monthly/4
magnitudes: monthly subsidy divided by four weeks

nodes.label: Qualifying work = critical infrastructure; non-qualifying work free
Qualifying thresholds scale with layer institutional intensity: stricter up, looser down
Progressive taxation in all layers, scaled to institutional benefits each layer receives
Top marginal rates set via Article XXV.VI ladder as federal law; Charter reaches no rate
UBI and PJS untaxed in every layer, unconditionally and without exception
Tax applies to earned income above UBI/PJS: gains, revenue, profits, wages
SCM is separate anti-hoarding instrument; tax funds treasury; neither substitutes
Per-layer currencies; +1 and 0 share one currency; -1, -2, -3 each separate
Currency non-convertible across boundaries; upward conversion prohibited without exception
Downward conversion only via authorized channels at 90-99% forfeiture
Siloing protects upper-layer funding of socialized systems from arbitrage destabilization
Visitors/elective residents may transfer via retention schedule (10% to 1%)
Purchasing power gradient: ~1.3-1.8x, ~1.8-2.5x, ~2.5-4x; emergent by district
At conversion origin currency retired, destination issued; no cross-economy transfer
Illustration: $10,000 Main yields ~6,700 (-1), 4,700 (-2), 3,100 (-3) tokens
Transfer capped per retention schedule; untransferred assets stay; zero-transfer = neutral
Involuntary descent: all assets liquidated at market value; 100% of proceeds to Treasury
Joint assets liquidated in full; innocent party's share returned in cash at market value
Victim restitution and prior family binding agreements honored before treasury absorption
Assets moved to lower layer within 24 months pre-reassignment liquidated on same schedule
VPR filing permanently relinquishes origin-layer status; upward pathway closes at filing
VPR assets liquidated on progressive scale; must stay economically viable, capture value
VPR retention bands: 90-99% to treasury, 10-1% retained across $1M to $1B+ tiers
Liquidation at market value at filing; retained proceeds converted; joint rules identical
Assets moved to destination within 24 months pre-filing subject to same schedule
Elective residency keeps origin status and assets; transfers allowed; return anytime
Elective residents keep origin enforcement posture; breach = standard consequence
Visitation temporary; origin status and assets kept; no liquidation
Visitor acts ledger-recorded anywhere, judged by origin thresholds; breach = reassignment
Elective residents may return to origin or any higher layer anytime; assets accessible
Voluntary permanent residency permanently closes upward pathway; sealed at filing
Punitive reassignment closes upward pathway permanently; seals ceiling, not floor
STI recovery in punitive layer yields local standing only, never upward eligibility
SCM applies in all layers proportional to institutional presence; anti-hoarding purpose
Trigger population denominators use registered home address on implant ledger
Garnishing computed on balance at cycle start; obligation locks at pulse; anti-spend-down
Main/+1 trigger: 90-day rolling avg district savings at $100B (~1M citizens, $100k avg)
Active cycle garnishes 10% of total savings per month; no floor, exemptions, means testing
magnitudes: 10% of each citizen's total savings balance per month

nodes.label: Self-correcting equilibrium at $100,000 balance under $10,000/month UBI
Stock speculation and equity markets excluded from upper layers as complementary measure
-1 Noncompliance garnishing trigger and rate schedule
magnitudes: 5% of each citizen's total savings balance per month

nodes.label: -1 equilibrium illustration and whale-correction dynamics
-2/-3 mandate limited to VMSS-distributed funds; private earnings excluded
-2/-3 UBI-origin trigger thresholds and garnishing rate
Pro-rata UBI attribution method, implant-agnostic by design
magnitudes: 24-month rolling window of UBI and subsidy receipts

nodes.label: Cycles deactivate automatically when aggregate drops below trigger
Garnished funds return to Automation Dividend Treasury as UBI; corrective pulse
Savings base follows stored value regardless of form (LP-069)
Main Layer primary residence of record unconditionally exempt
Additional residences attribute at assessed value; occupied-primary exception; vacant full
Dormant commercial property attributes via central-bank clearing record as sole sensor
Attribution locks at liquidity: collateral, loans, in-kind exchange at fair value
No additional rate created; attribution feeds existing pulse mechanics
+1 Sanctuary property cap in place of residential attribution
-3 free of ordinary VMSS institutional economic presence and oversight
-3 Savings Circulation Mandate restated: UBI-origin savings only
Base tax funds partitioned -3 treasury for minimal federal infrastructure
Traditional markets and private institutions operate freely in -3
Currency siloing: terminal realm wealth cannot convert upward
Article IV scope summary: implants, augmentation, vessels, enforcement protocol
Backup vessel fabrication sovereign, proprietary, non-transferable
-1/-2 continuity serviced via closed VMSS fabrication proxy installations
-3: no proxy; implant severs vessel link at terminal reassignment; death final
Three continuity layers; doctrine binds primarily to ledger continuity
Revival is binary: full fidelity or failure, no partial state
STI weight refinement is maintenance; dimension-set change requires Article XI
Freedom of speech unless harm threshold crossed
Consensual adult prostitution permitted
All body transmutations permitted
Abortion illegal, treated as murder under VMSS law
Linked fetus reincarnated in Main autoparenting with neutral status, full dignity
No maternal implant, no vessel link: continuity provision does not reach fetus
Unimplanted foreign nationals under VMSS jurisdiction; ledger opened at adjudication
Automated daycare, education, medical services (except -3)
Children born in lower layers remain with parents; autoparenting a choice, not default
Standing human right to relocate to Main Layer, implant-enforceable
Heaven Layers: pre-intervention halts acts mid-execution; no harm completes
Main/-1/-2: post-intervention; victims revived (murder) or treated (other harm)
Perpetrators face immediate layer reassignment
-3: no daily intervention or revival; acts complete freely, death final
-3 federal floor activates only on two triggers; self-ordering sovereign below them
Upward movement earned; two distinct mobility mechanisms
Phasing 0/+1: STI-driven, reversible; phase-back below floor or on trust violation
Reassignment into -1/-2/-3: federal-violation triggered, immediate, permanent
Downward visitation temporary; origin status, assets, relationship retained
Elective residency indefinite with right of return at any time
Voluntary permanent residency: filing, III.V liquidation, screening, upward waiver
Visitation and elective residency flow downward only; no upward visitation rights
Layers are distinct environments, not a hierarchy of suffering; gradient one-way up
Automatic fetal backup vessel linkage at detected pregnancy via mother's implant
Mother without active implant produces no link; provision does not extend
Continuity link instrumentation-bearing: any implant-grade apparatus extends it
Linked fetus reincarnated into own vessel in Main autoparenting, neutral status
Abortion illegal, classified as murder; mother faces layer consequences
Children remain with parents; no automatic relocation at birth
Relocation to Main a standing human right, no parental consent required
Independent AI legal advocate for every child
Autoparenting a freely chosen destination, not a condition imposed
Parents hold no institutional dominion over children's right of exit
SADs: voluntary, revocable, metric-gated domains nested in Heaven Layers
SAD violation: automatic exclusion to layer below; no reassignment or punishment
Exit always permitted from Main Layer and above
Re-entry requires moral accounting: STI evaluation, screening, prior crimes counted
Exit from -3 impossible — terminal
Article XI sole Charter amendment mechanism; only nation-wide instrument
Amendment must clear every gate in sequence; failure at any gate terminates
Meritboard filibuster floor gate against incoherence
Supreme Court constitutional review gate
Core-reaching amendments flagged with scope disclosed; evasive drafts struck
Population ratification: Sanctuary consensus plus gravity-scaled Main supermajority
magnitudes: consensus — not a supermajority, full agreement — in +1 Sanctuary

nodes.label: Consensus as window deliberation; every vote rescindable until window close
Consensus measured among cast votes; abstention not dissent; no quorum
Rescission rule extends to Main, XXV.VI federal, and XXVIII ratification votes
Lower layers (-1/-2/-3) hold no Charter amendment vote; other rights retained
Final presidential veto; no override in cycle; redraft restarts from Meritboard
Founding core load-bearing, not immutable; protection structural, not textual
No single body, including Chief Architect, may unilaterally rewrite the Charter
Layer entry/remain/removal criteria changes require full Article XI, beyond XXVIII
Supreme Court emergency suspension: one-case, time-limited, auto-expiring
Federal law (XXV.VI) mirrors Article XI at proportionally relaxed thresholds
Repeal of ratified amendment follows the same full Article XI process
No single metric may unilaterally determine punitive assignment or descent
Phasing exempt: single-metric threshold trigger permitted as return to baseline
Metrics are signals; punitive decisions structurally independent of any one metric
Phasing exempt as non-punitive return to previously qualified layer
System responses must scale proportionally to behavior and context
Three axes defined: severity, pattern, reversibility (victim-restorability reading)
Axis-count ladder: corrective, multi-factor evaluation, qualifying event
No response may exceed axis profile; overcorrection is failure under Article XX
Minor Main Layer infractions clearable; full agency to remediate
-1 reassignment threshold is trajectory evaluation, not a countdown
No pathway back after punitive reassignment; STI serves in-layer life only
Supreme Court remedial authority for verified institutional error; no appeals path
Long-term stability prioritized; volatility structurally minimized
Design must minimize manipulation, gaming, and strategic abuse incentives
Assessments consider cumulative behavior, context, and network dynamics
Statistically anomalous beneficiary patterns accumulate on leader's ledger
Active architects accrue aggregate harm; passive beneficiaries only direct acts
Temporal clustering read as coordination; aggregate axis profile applies to each
magnitudes: one coordinated event with twenty contributors

nodes.label: Continuous evaluation of how outputs influence future behavior
Internal review, correction, and adaptation mechanisms required
Participation anomalies feed mandatory public Meritboard audit assessment
Court of 10 justices from legal-interpretation ranking, President-appointed
Judicial independence via metric separation, not pool separation
Jurisdiction limited to edge cases; no legislation, no routine arbitration
Layer reassignment categorical; same profile, same outcome; no judicial discretion
AI-administered novelty filter gates Court access; deterministic cases rejected
Rulings auto-integrate as settled precedent; novelty extinction
Suspension power during verified emergencies, subject to Article XI bounds
Renewable terms; presidential replacement on performance or outranking
Rulings wrong in retrospect are revisable; authority not infallible
Meritboard: continuously updating competence ranking with functional sub-rankings
Active standing by willingness; withdrawal anytime without consequence
Roles filled from top of active ranking; no campaigns, nominations, or politics
President: executive-doctrinal duties and living interpretive authority
President steps off ranking on appointment; deputy pre-designated for succession
Mutual audit structure: Meritboard, AI governance, Court, President
No ranked entity designs its own metric; calibration operational, not unilateral
Ten-year blinded review challenge via Court-appointed Review Panel
Two blinded inputs: public sentiment polling and Panel assessment, panel-weighted
Immediate succession if challenger surpasses; no consecutive-term limit
Unseated President returns to ranking without stigma, eligible for re-selection
Blind factor prevents review optimization and perpetual doctrinal lock
Measured achievement sorts leadership; breadth prevents domain capture
Leakage: gap between stated and actual consequence; compounds across systems
Founding aspiration: 0% leakage across all categories — a direction, not a promise
~25% leakage anticipated and accepted in formative phases
Dated leakage reduction trajectory 2150–3000
Final-150-year parabolic convergence; generational tightening of the framework
0.01% target is weighted average across layers/categories, not uniform promise
Heaven Layer leakage approaches theoretical zero; anomaly-scale by 3000
Heaven medical infrastructure guaranteed, immediate, comprehensive
-3 federal floor only; no guaranteed medical; private market determines access
-3 structural leakage floor persists at civilizational maturity
-1/-2 gradient: partial, uneven medical coverage; never near-zero
Medical completeness aspiration with standing equal to zero leakage
Charter floor: no layer permits starvation; every citizen begins with full dignity
